3269220.name: Fantasy Grounds - Savage Saturday Cinema: Voronezh Incident
3269220.description:
Savage Saturday Cinema: Voronezh Incident

The Voronezh Incident is a pulpy, campy "spy-fi" action adventure set in the Cold War era of the early 1960s, in the vein of
Jonny Quest or the
Venture Brothers . The heroes are members of a team of super scientists, moderately well known as global problem solvers. They are called to investigate a report of mutated, oversized creatures plaguing a town in rural Soviet Union.Welcome to Savage Saturday Cinema, Pinnacle's line of short adventures for Savage Worlds. These scenarios are intended for a single session of play, whether at home, at a convention, or even a pick-up game at your friendly local gaming store. They can stand on their own as a complete adventure, or Game Masters may work them into ongoing campaigns as a one-off or side quest. Each adventure comes with pregenerated characters so you can get right into the action.
Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: Calum Mc Dermott
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and a one time purchase of the Savage Worlds Adventure Edition ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
